title: chiliadenus sericeus subsp. virescens
intro: Chiliadenus sericeus subsp. virescens, commonly known as the hairy fringed gentian, is a plant species belonging to the gentian family, native to the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chiliadenus sericeus subsp. virescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
